name: SA Sample - Journal Builder
brief: Sample: AI-generated General Journal lines from free-text description in Business Central.
description: A PromptDialog on the General Journal page accepts free text (e.g. an expense narrative); the Smart Agent returns a JSON array of journal lines; the codeunit creates them on the active batch. A reference for free-text-to-multi-row AI workflows in D365 BC — useful for finance teams that want LLM-assisted journal entry.
